prompt: Tap big blind seat before medium-stack tournament action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before ICM decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The big blind is the right seat anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the forced defender who has to absorb the pressure first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind is the target seat anchor because this medium-stack ICM read changes once the forced defender is identified.
